candidate_llm_application: LLM pruning schedule trade-offs: aggressive weight-pruning forces concentrated capacity in remaining weights; choosing pruning topology (Guyot-style head vs cordon-style branching) shapes downstream capability.

results.title: Structured Pruning + Curriculum: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on structured pruning + curriculum, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (structured pruning + curriculum); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (viticulture terms vs LLM terms).
